raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1400 directs the Chancellor of the California Community Colleges to establish a pilot program to allow community college districts to offer a Bachelor of Science in nursing degree.",
    "California's current healthcare workforce development system is not equipped to handle the growing nursing needs of the state, especially in disadvantaged communities.",
    "The needs of the healthcare workforce more frequently demand a bachelor's degree in nursing.",
    "AB 58 provides a roadmap for UC Merced to accommodate a fully independent medical school.",
    "UC Merced serves a disproportionate number of first-generation college students from low-income households.",
    "The transition to a fully independent medical school at UC Merced is desperately needed for the Central Valley."
  ]
}
